title: Can't add OAuth redirect URL
excerpt: I’m unable to save a Redirect URL. I’m using a major version and my URL looks like this: https://[mydomain]/api/oauth/callback. The error I’m getting is: “App feature update failed.”.

posts.author: oalbrecht (Oliver Albrecht)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m unable to save a Redirect URL. I’m using a major version and my URL looks like this: https://[mydomain]/api/oauth/callback. The error I’m getting is: “App feature update failed.”.

posts.author: oalbrecht (Oliver Albrecht)
posts.cookedHtml: Looks like it works now. I guess it was a temporary outage.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @oalbrecht!

I am glad this is working now. Please do let us know if you find another issue. I recommend sending an email to appsupport@monday.com for any issues regarding the apps framework or the API

Cheers,
Matias
